label: 6-phase code overhaul
detail: Completed cleanup, code-split, a11y, design, SEO, and animation overhaul. Jettisoned Astryx/53 unused deps/44 shadcn files. Inter → Outfit font swap. bg-black → bg-neutral-950. Parallax tilt design spell on hero frames.

label: Git hygiene — untrack node_modules
detail: Removed node_modules (7777 files), .agents/, .claude/, dist/ from git tracking. Updated .gitignore with proper patterns.

label: Custom cursor may hurt perf/a11y
detail: Custom SVG camera cursor on <a>/<button> — design-taste-frontend skill flags this as outdated and harmful. Keep for brand but monitor.

label: Editorial serif + premium sans pairing
detail: Newsreader serif for editorial headings, Outfit sans for body. Replaced banned Inter font with Outfit (Google Fonts).

label: Design taste: off-black over pure black
detail: bg-neutral-950 (tailwind off-black) preferred over bg-black per High-Agency Frontend skill. Subtle but gives more depth.
